summary: Tested Country Dropdown implementation in Admin Dashboard. Cities and Airports Management: Country fields use <select> dropdowns with 195 countries (ALL_COUNTRIES array). Hotels Management: The HotelEditForm.jsx component still uses plain <input type='text'> for country - NOT a dropdown. This is a missing implementation issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Country field is a plain text input instead of dropdown with 195 countries like Cities and Airports
ui_bugs.fix_needed: Change line 908-915 to use <select> with ALL_COUNTRIES array like AdminDashboard.jsx does for airports/cities

airports_add_country_dropdown.details: Add New Airport modal has Country dropdown with 195 options (SELECT element with data-testid='edit-airport-country')

airports_edit_country_prefilled.details: Edit Airport modal shows country pre-filled (tested with Algeria for Houari Boumediene Airport)

cities_add_country_dropdown.details: Add New City modal has Country dropdown with 195 options (SELECT element with data-testid='edit-city-country')

cities_edit_country_prefilled.details: Edit City modal shows country pre-filled (tested with Georgia for Tbilisi)

cities_create_with_dropdown.details: Created 'Test City 123' with country 'United States' selected from dropdown - saved successfully

hotels_add_country_dropdown.details: Add New Hotel modal (HotelEditForm.jsx) uses plain text input for Country, NOT a dropdown. The Country field is on line 908-915 of HotelEditForm.jsx and uses <input type='text'> instead of <select> with ALL_COUNTRIES array.

hotels_simple_modal_dropdown.details: AdminDashboard.jsx renderEditModal() for hotels (lines 552-566) DOES have country dropdown, but Hotels tab opens HotelEditForm.jsx instead

action_items: Update HotelEditForm.jsx lines 908-915 to use <select> dropdown with ALL_COUNTRIES array instead of plain text input
Import ALL_COUNTRIES into HotelEditForm.jsx from AdminDashboard.jsx or create a shared constants file
Add data-testid='edit-hotel-country' to the hotel country dropdown for testing consistency
critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.jsx correctly implements country dropdowns for Airports (lines 480-490) and Cities (lines 506-516)
HotelEditForm.jsx (lines 908-915) still uses plain text input for country - needs to be updated to match other forms
ALL_COUNTRIES array is defined at line 15 of AdminDashboard.jsx with exactly 195 countries
Consider extracting ALL_COUNTRIES to a shared constants file to avoid duplication when adding to HotelEditForm.jsx
seed_data_creation: Created test city 'Test City 123' with country 'United States' for testing - can be deleted
context_for_next_testing_agent: Country dropdowns work correctly in Cities and Airports Management (AdminDashboard.jsx). The issue is ONLY in HotelEditForm.jsx where the Country field (lines 908-915) uses <input type='text'> instead of <select> with ALL_COUNTRIES. Main agent needs to update HotelEditForm.jsx to use a dropdown. The simple hotel modal in AdminDashboard.jsx renderEditModal() (lines 552-566) already has the dropdown implementation that can be copied.
